# TMS Learning References

> Truth documents and web links saved by Derek6_Tutor.
> Last updated: 2026-03-21

## Frontend (Angular 21 / PrimeNG 21 / Tailwind CSS 4)

### Official Docs
- [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/) — Signals, standalone components, new control flow
- [PrimeNG Docs](https://primeng.org/) — UI components, Aura theme, styled mode
- [Tailwind CSS Docs](https://tailwindcss.com/docs) — Utility-first CSS, v4 changes
- [tailwindcss-primeui](https://github.com/primefaces/tailwindcss-primeui) — PrimeNG + Tailwind integration

---

## Backend (ASP.NET Core 10 / Identity / EF Core 10)

### Official Docs
- [ASP.NET Core Docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/) — Web API, middleware, DI
- [ASP.NET Identity Docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/security/authentication/identity) — Auth, JWT, roles
- [EF Core Docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/ef/core/) — Code-first, migrations, queries

---

## Database (SQL Server)

- [SQL Server Docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/sql-server/) — T-SQL, indexing, performance
